name: Client
history: Recurrent stomachaches and physical symptoms associated with anxiety and stress. Past difficulties involving weight management, sexuality, and academic performance. Reports a transformation during college. Reports seeking control in relationships.
intermediate_belief: I must keep it together and handle everything myself.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I stop and take care of myself, I won't be able to start again.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of tasks and responsibilities to prevent feeling overwhelmed.
situation: Concern about losing positive aspects of life or returning to a previous unhappy state.
auto_thought: If I just sit down and don't move, I won't have to worry about the things I don't want to do.
behavior: Avoidance of tasks and responsibilities, debating dishonest actions to cope with work frustrations.
